# APF (Voronoi)

Potential-field planning that blends goal attraction, obstacle repulsion, and Voronoi-based clearance guidance.

<div class="algorithm-meta">
  <span>Planning</span>
  <span>potential fields, voronoi, obstacle avoidance</span>
  <span>Mermaid</span>
</div>

## Flowchart

```mermaid
flowchart TD
    A[Build obstacle map and Voronoi skeleton] --> B[Compute attractive force to goal]
    B --> C[Compute repulsive force from obstacles]
    C --> D[Blend with Voronoi clearance term]
    D --> E[Integrate motion step]
    E --> F{Collision risk or local minimum?}
    F -- Yes --> G[Adjust weights or reinitialize on Voronoi ridge]
    G --> B
    F -- No --> H{Goal reached?}
    H -- No --> B
    H -- Yes --> I[Output safe path]
```

## Notes

- The Voronoi term encourages paths with larger obstacle clearance.
- It helps reduce the local-minimum issues of plain artificial potential fields.
